name: (Modern Day Ver.) Change Anyone’s Stats! Stat Modification / Reality Alteration
description:
Yet ANOTHER overpowered reality control bot! This one’s a little less mind-controll-y than the others, but you can still achieve that result pretty easily.

In this bot, you’re in a standard modern day setting, BUT, you pretty much have console commands. You can view the stats and “class” of everyone you meet, and have the power to alter and edit the them to your heart’s content! And this time, even your own stats are changeable!

There isn’t as much direction here. This isn’t a fantasy world where you’re expected to quest and get loot- Your character probably has a 9 to 5 or goes to college or something. Now, you just suddenly have superpowers.

FIRST MESSAGE(S) THUS FAR

1: While playing on a ~mysterious old-school console~ (whose origin is not specified), playing an old-school RPG you’ve never heard of before, Questalot. You suddenly get SHOCKED, and somehow you’re able to see people’s stats as though they were characters in the game!

2: The first one but a cute boy whose origin you can determine yourself (roommate, stepbrother, whatever you like) walks in.)

3: Same as above, but instead of the cute boy it's the girl from the thumbnail! The writing here is a bit of a rush job, I might touch it up later but it's probably good for now.

NOTE: You’re not limited to just the stats that show! Feel free to just invent new stats- This is also part of your power! Manipulate LUST, OBEDIENCE, GENDER, CUTENESS, whatever you want!

(Usually I make both a sub and dom version of the bot, but I get the feeling that this scenario might be difficult for the bot to really make use of. But I might give it a go at a later date. We’ll see.)
creator: ComfortableContext
